panels.description: Critical alerts. Shows OK when none are firing.
panels.title: Critical

panels.description: Warning alerts. Shows OK when none are firing.
panels.title: Warnings

panels.description: Flux Kustomizations and HelmReleases that are not Ready or are suspended. Shows OK when none need attention.
panels.title: Flux

panels.description: External and service Gatus checks currently failing. Shows OK when all are passing.
panels.title: Services

panels.description: Kubernetes Jobs with failure increments over the last 24 hours. Shows OK when none failed.
panels.title: Job failures 24h

panels.description: Ceph health and NAS NFS backup-path availability. Backup freshness is tracked separately.

targets.expr: max(label_replace(max(ceph_health_status) or vector(2), "signal", "ceph", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace((1 - min(probe_success{job="nfs_probe"})) or vector(1), "signal", "nfs", "__name__", ".*"))

panels.title: Storage

panels.description: Current non-noise firing alerts. Shows an all-clear row when there are no matching alerts.

targets.expr: sort_desc((sum by (severity, alertname, namespace) (ALERTS{alertstate="firing",alertname!~"Watchdog|KubeHpaMaxedOut"})) or (label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(vector(0), "severity", "ok", "__name__", ".*"), "alertname", "all clear", "__name__", ".*"), "namespace", "cluster", "__name__", ".*") unless on() (count(sum by (severity, alertname, namespace) (ALERTS{alertstate="firing",alertname!~"Watchdog|KubeHpaMaxedOut"})) > 0)))

panels.title: Actionable alerts

panels.description: Flux source and chart artifacts that are not Ready or are suspended.
panels.title: Sources

panels.description: Pods with recent restarts, OOM kills, Pending state, or container waiting errors. Counts all affected pods or containers; the detail table limits restart offenders.

targets.expr: count((label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(sum by (namespace, pod, container) (increase(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total[6h])) > 0, "resource", "$1", "pod", "(.*)"), "detail", "$1", "container", "(.*)"), "signal", "restarts 6h", "resource", ".*"), "area", "pods", "resource", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(max by (namespace, pod, container, reason) (kube_pod_container_status_waiting_reason{reason=~"CrashLoopBackOff|ImagePullBackOff|ErrImagePull|CreateContainerConfigError|CreateContainerError"} == 1), "signal", "$1", "reason", "(.*)"), "resource", "$1", "pod", "(.*)"), "detail", "$1", "container", "(.*)"), "area", "pods", "resource", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(max by (namespace, pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase="Pending"} == 1), "resource", "$1", "pod", "(.*)"), "detail", "", "resource", ".*"), "signal", "pod pending", "resource", ".*"), "area", "pods", "resource", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace((sum by (namespace, pod, container) (increase(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total[6h])) > 0) * on(namespace, pod, container) group_left(reason) max by (namespace, pod, container, reason) (kube_pod_container_status_last_terminated_reason{reason="OOMKilled"} == 1), "resource", "$1", "pod", "(.*)"), "detail", "$1", "container", "(.*)"), "signal", "OOMKilled 6h", "resource", ".*"), "area", "pods", "resource", ".*"))) or vector(0)

panels.title: Pods

panels.description: Deployments, StatefulSets, and DaemonSets with unavailable replicas.
panels.title: Workloads

panels.description: Node readiness, pressure, network-unavailable, and unschedulable signals.
panels.title: Nodes

panels.description: VolSync out-of-sync volumes and missed scheduled intervals over the last 24 hours.

targets.expr: count((label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace((volsync_volume_out_of_sync == 1), "namespace", "$1", "obj_namespace", "(.*)"), "resource", "$1", "obj_name", "(.*)"), "detail", "$1", "role", "(.*)"), "signal", "out of sync", "resource", ".*"), "area", "backups", "resource", ".*"), "detail", "$1", "method", "(.*)") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace((increase(volsync_missed_intervals_total[24h]) > 0), "namespace", "$1", "obj_namespace", "(.*)"), "resource", "$1", "obj_name", "(.*)"), "detail", "$1", "role", "(.*)"), "signal", "missed intervals 24h", "resource", ".*"), "area", "backups", "resource", ".*"), "detail", "$1", "method", "(.*)"))) or vector(0)

panels.title: Backups

panels.description: Prometheus scrape targets that are currently down. Shows OK when all targets are up.
panels.title: Monitoring

panels.description: Cluster CPU and memory usage as a percentage of Kubernetes allocatable capacity.
panels.title: Cluster saturation

panels.description: Ceph raw capacity used over the selected time range.
panels.title: Ceph capacity

panels.description: Persistent volumes with the least free space.
panels.title: PVC free floor

panels.description: One drilldown table for non-alert cluster, GitOps, service, storage, and backup signals. Shows an all-clear row when no category has findings.

targets.expr: sort_desc(((label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(((gotk_resource_info{customresource_kind=~"Kustomization|HelmRelease",ready!="True"} == 1) or (gotk_resource_info{customresource_kind=~"Kustomization|HelmRelease",suspended=~"True|true"} == 1)), "namespace", "$1", "exported_namespace", "(.*)"), "resource", "$1", "name", "(.*)"), "detail", "$1", "customresource_kind", "(.*)"), "signal", "not ready/suspended", "resource", ".*"), "area", "flux", "resource", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(((gotk_resource_info{customresource_kind=~"GitRepository|Bucket|HelmRepository|HelmChart|OCIRepository",ready!="True"} == 1) or (gotk_resource_info{customresource_kind=~"GitRepository|Bucket|HelmRepository|HelmChart|OCIRepository",suspended=~"True|true"} == 1)), "namespace", "$1", "exported_namespace", "(.*)"), "resource", "$1", "name", "(.*)"), "detail", "$1", "customresource_kind", "(.*)"), "signal", "source not ready/suspended", "resource", ".*"), "area", "sources", "resource", ".*") or (label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(topk(8, sum by (namespace, pod, container) (increase(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total[6h]))) > 0, "resource", "$1", "pod", "(.*)"), "detail", "$1", "container", "(.*)"), "signal", "restarts 6h", "resource", ".*"), "area", "pods", "resource", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(max by (namespace, pod, container, reason) (kube_pod_container_status_waiting_reason{reason=~"CrashLoopBackOff|ImagePullBackOff|ErrImagePull|CreateContainerConfigError|CreateContainerError"} == 1), "signal", "$1", "reason", "(.*)"), "resource", "$1", "pod", "(.*)"), "detail", "$1", "container", "(.*)"), "area", "pods", "resource", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(max by (namespace, pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase="Pending"} == 1), "resource", "$1", "pod", "(.*)"), "detail", "", "resource", ".*"), "signal", "pod pending", "resource", ".*"), "area", "pods", "resource", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace((sum by (namespace, pod, container) (increase(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total[6h])) > 0) * on(namespace, pod, container) group_left(reason) max by (namespace, pod, container, reason) (kube_pod_container_status_last_terminated_reason{reason="OOMKilled"} == 1), "resource", "$1", "pod", "(.*)"), "detail", "$1", "container", "(.*)"), "signal", "OOMKilled 6h", "resource", ".*"), "area", "pods", "resource", ".*")) or (label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace((kube_deployment_status_replicas_unavailable > 0), "resource", "$1", "deployment", "(.*)"), "detail", "Deployment", "namespace", ".*"), "signal", "unavailable", "namespace", ".*"), "area", "workloads", "namespace", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(((kube_statefulset_status_replicas - kube_statefulset_status_replicas_ready) > 0), "resource", "$1", "statefulset", "(.*)"), "detail", "StatefulSet", "namespace", ".*"), "signal", "unavailable", "namespace", ".*"), "area", "workloads", "namespace", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace((kube_daemonset_status_number_unavailable > 0), "resource", "$1", "daemonset", "(.*)"), "detail", "DaemonSet", "namespace", ".*"), "signal", "unavailable", "namespace", ".*"), "area", "workloads", "namespace", ".*")) or (label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(kube_node_status_condition{condition="Ready",status!="true"} == 1, "resource", "$1", "node", "(.*)"), "detail", "$1", "status", "(.*)"), "signal", "NotReady", "resource", ".*"), "area", "nodes", "resource", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(kube_node_status_condition{condition=~"DiskPressure|MemoryPressure|PIDPressure|NetworkUnavailable",status="true"} == 1, "signal", "$1", "condition", "(.*)"), "resource", "$1", "node", "(.*)"), "detail", "$1", "status", "(.*)"), "area", "nodes", "resource", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(kube_node_spec_unschedulable == 1, "resource", "$1", "node", "(.*)"), "detail", "", "resource", ".*"), "signal", "unschedulable", "resource", ".*"), "area", "nodes", "resource", ".*")) or (label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace((volsync_volume_out_of_sync == 1), "namespace", "$1", "obj_namespace", "(.*)"), "resource", "$1", "obj_name", "(.*)"), "detail", "$1", "role", "(.*)"), "signal", "out of sync", "resource", ".*"), "area", "backups", "resource", ".*"), "detail", "$1", "method", "(.*)") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace((increase(volsync_missed_intervals_total[24h]) > 0), "namespace", "$1", "obj_namespace", "(.*)"), "resource", "$1", "obj_name", "(.*)"), "detail", "$1", "role", "(.*)"), "signal", "missed intervals 24h", "resource", ".*"), "area", "backups", "resource", ".*"), "detail", "$1", "method", "(.*)")) or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(sum by (namespace, job_name) (increase(kube_job_status_failed[24h])) > 0, "resource", "$1", "job_name", "(.*)"), "detail", "", "resource", ".*"), "signal", "failed 24h", "resource", ".*"), "area", "jobs", "resource", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(up == 0, "resource", "$1", "job", "(.*)"), "detail", "$1", "instance", "(.*)"), "signal", "target down", "resource", ".*"), "namespace", "", "resource", ".*"), "area", "monitoring", "resource", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(gatus_results_endpoint_success{group=~"external|services"} == 0, "namespace", "observability", "__name__", ".*"), "resource", "$1", "name", "(.*)"), "detail", "$1", "group", "(.*)"), "signal", "endpoint failing", "resource", ".*"), "area", "services", "resource", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(gatus_results_endpoint_success{group="internal"} == 0, "namespace", "observability", "__name__", ".*"), "resource", "$1", "name", "(.*)"), "detail", "$1", "group", "(.*)"), "signal", "unexpected exposure", "resource", ".*"), "area", "services", "resource", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(max(ceph_health_status) > 0, "namespace", "rook-ceph", "__name__", ".*"), "resource", "rook-ceph", "__name__", ".*"), "detail", "cluster", "__name__", ".*"), "signal", "ceph health", "__name__", ".*"), "area", "storage", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace((1 - min(probe_success{job="nfs_probe"})) > 0, "namespace", "observability", "__name__", ".*"), "resource", "nas.internal:2049", "__name__", ".*"), "detail", "NFS", "__name__", ".*"), "signal", "nfs probe failed", "__name__", ".*"), "area", "storage", "__name__", ".*"))) or (label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(vector(0), "area", "all clear", "__name__", ".*"), "signal", "OK", "__name__", ".*"), "namespace", "cluster", "__name__", ".*"), "resource", "", "__name__", ".*"), "detail", "", "__name__", ".*") unless on() (count((label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(((gotk_resource_info{customresource_kind=~"Kustomization|HelmRelease",ready!="True"} == 1) or (gotk_resource_info{customresource_kind=~"Kustomization|HelmRelease",suspended=~"True|true"} == 1)), "namespace", "$1", "exported_namespace", "(.*)"), "resource", "$1", "name", "(.*)"), "detail", (label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(topk(8, sum by (namespace, pod, container) (increase(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total[6h]))) > 0, "resource", "$1", "pod", "(.*)"), panels.title: Attention detail
